rulings.Case Title: BERNADETTE MCMENAMIN VS. IGP INDUSTRIES, LLC, A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Amend Complaint Per Request Of The Parties And Approval Of The Court
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 21, 2009, line 2, Plaintiff'S Motion To Amend Complaint. AT REQUEST OF PARTIES, COURT IS RULING ON MOTION TO AMEND. GRANT MOTION TO AMEND IN PART I.E. ADD A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONCEALMENT, CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF AGREEING TO NEW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT HEARD AT LEAST 20 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. DENY AMENDING TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT CONCEALMENT. DENY WITHOUT PREJUDICE AMENDING TO ADD INDIVIDUALS AND IGP PARTNERS UNTIL AFTER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT HEARD. PARTIES MAY SEEK DISCOVERY AND TRIAL DATE CHANGE IN APPROPRIATE DEPARTMENTS. =(302/PHA/PB)
